mapper.select: SELECT UC.user_id AS userId, UC.login_id AS loginId, UC.password AS password FROM USER_CREDENTIAL UC INNER JOIN USERS U ON U.USER_ID = UC.USER_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND UC.user_id = #{userId} AND U.DELETED_YN = 'N'
SELECT IF(COUNT(NICKNAME) > 0, 'Y', 'N') AS existsYn FROM USERS WHERE NICKNAME = #{nickname}
SELECT IF(COUNT(EMAIL) > 0, 'Y', 'N') AS existsYn FROM USERS WHERE EMAIL = #{email}
